\tzpentry{ID4896}{Conductivity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4896 introduces Conductivity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\sigma_{ij} = \frac{E}{1+\nu} \left( \epsilon_{ij} + \frac{\nu}{1-2\nu} \delta_{ij} \epsilon_{kk} \right) + \mathcal{G}_{\mu\nu}(\text{Metric Drag})\]
